item.title: note.com/miyama_sos/n... > 日本のデモのやり方は間違っていない。 同時に、魔法のようなやり方も…
item.author: 鯨庭 (@kujiraba.bsky.social)
item.description:
note.com/miyama_sos/n...
> 日本のデモのやり方は間違っていない。
同時に、魔法のようなやり方もないので地道に続けるしかない。

肝心なのは、
・絶えず声を上げ続ける。
・できるだけ人が多く集まる場所で行う。
・重要な時間帯は朝7～9時、夜18時～20時のラッシュアワー。
・周囲に多少の摩擦を生む。
ということのようだ。

順番に行こう。
メディアが報道に消極的な中「もっと良い方法、何か正解があるのでは？」と不安になるが、今のまま続けるのが一番よいとのこと。

韓国の方いつもありがとう😭絶対勝てるし絶対勝とう！
item.content:encoded:
note.com/miyama_sos/n...
> 日本のデモのやり方は間違っていない。
同時に、魔法のようなやり方もないので地道に続けるしかない。

肝心なのは、
・絶えず声を上げ続ける。
・できるだけ人が多く集まる場所で行う。
・重要な時間帯は朝7～9時、夜18時～20時のラッシュアワー。
・周囲に多少の摩擦を生む。
ということのようだ。

順番に行こう。
メディアが報道に消極的な中「もっと良い方法、何か正解があるのでは？」と不安になるが、今のまま続けるのが一番よいとのこと。

韓国の方いつもありがとう😭絶対勝てるし絶対勝とう！

item.title: An ICE officer is trained for 71 days. It takes 150 days to…
item.author: The Liberal BoJack (@thelibbojack.bsky.social)
item.description: An ICE officer is trained for 71 days. It takes 150 days to become a certified pet stylist at Petco. One grooms dogs… the other carry’s guns. This is what’s wrong with our country.
item.content:encoded: An ICE officer is trained for 71 days. It takes 150 days to become a certified pet stylist at Petco. One grooms dogs… the other carry’s guns. This is what’s wrong with our country.

item.title: #🔖政治と経済 たった6時間の審議で｢愛子天皇｣の可能性はゼロに…高市政権の横暴をみすみす許した｢中道改革｣のだらしな…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖政治と経済
たった6時間の審議で｢愛子天皇｣の可能性はゼロに…高市政権の横暴をみすみす許した｢中道改革｣のだらしなさ

7月17日、改正皇室典範が参院本会議で可決し、成立した。ジャーナリストの尾中香尚里さんは「気になるのは、まるで自民党に追いすがるように改正案に賛成した中道改革連合の態度だ。彼らは、野党第1党固有の役割を担えていない」という――。 皇室典範改正を押し通した高市政権のおぞましさ 政界をおよそ「静謐ではない」...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖政治と経済
たった6時間の審議で｢愛子天皇｣の可能性はゼロに…高市政権の横暴をみすみす許した｢中道改革｣のだらしなさ

7月17日、改正皇室典範が参院本会議で可決し、成立した。ジャーナリストの尾中香尚里さんは「気になるのは、まるで自民党に追いすがるように改正案に賛成した中道改革連合の態度だ。彼らは、野党第1党固有の役割を担えていない」という――。 皇室典範改正を押し通した高市政権のおぞましさ 政界をおよそ「静謐ではない」...

item.title: The company said it is reducing its headcount by 20%, or abo…
item.author: TechCrunch (@techcrunch.com)
item.description: The company said it is reducing its headcount by 20%, or about 630 staff, to "support a leaner, more focused operating model" as it focuses on its AI Work Platform.
item.content:encoded: The company said it is reducing its headcount by 20%, or about 630 staff, to "support a leaner, more focused operating model" as it focuses on its AI Work Platform.

item.description: From @theathletic.com: Charlie Woods, son of 15-time major champion Tiger Woods, failed to advance to match play at the U.S. Junior Amateur on Wednesday after a fan disrupted his backswing with their phone's camera clicking.
item.content:encoded: From @theathletic.com: Charlie Woods, son of 15-time major champion Tiger Woods, failed to advance to match play at the U.S. Junior Amateur on Wednesday after a fan disrupted his backswing with their phone's camera clicking.

item.title: #青空ごはん部 #入院中病院食 【 頑張りました 】 連日の猛暑 お見舞い申し上げます… 🫒 本日も各所で昨日同様…
item.author: 園芸の狼 (@gardeningwerewolf.bsky.social)
item.description:
#青空ごはん部
#入院中病院食

【 頑張りました 】

連日の猛暑 お見舞い申し上げます… 🫒
本日も各所で昨日同様「酷暑」を記録しました
三重県の桑名では４０.６℃ と、昨日の岐阜県多治見市の４０.３℃ を上回る暑さとなりました … 🫒
そして北海道では、十勝岳が２０余年振りに噴火しました … なんつうか、もう、自然の猛威の前になすすべなしと云う感じです… 🍆

一方その頃リハビリ体操を頑張っております
今日は自転車運動のペダリングをハードに設定、二十分間休憩なしでトライしました 🫒
ヤりきった後は、猫のひたいに玉の汗、いやァまったく、頑張りました … 🙌

無理ない程度に頑張ります… 🫒
item.content:encoded:
#青空ごはん部
#入院中病院食

【 頑張りました 】

連日の猛暑 お見舞い申し上げます… 🫒
本日も各所で昨日同様「酷暑」を記録しました
三重県の桑名では４０.６℃ と、昨日の岐阜県多治見市の４０.３℃ を上回る暑さとなりました … 🫒
そして北海道では、十勝岳が２０余年振りに噴火しました … なんつうか、もう、自然の猛威の前になすすべなしと云う感じです… 🍆

一方その頃リハビリ体操を頑張っております
今日は自転車運動のペダリングをハードに設定、二十分間休憩なしでトライしました 🫒
ヤりきった後は、猫のひたいに玉の汗、いやァまったく、頑張りました … 🙌

無理ない程度に頑張ります… 🫒

item.title: This is Bailey. All of his toys got washed at the same time.…
item.author: WeRateDogs (@weratedogs.com)
item.description: This is Bailey. All of his toys got washed at the same time. He is interpreting this as some sort of ritualistic sacrifice. 13/10 I would sleep with one eye open (TT: goldenlifeofbailey)
item.content:encoded: This is Bailey. All of his toys got washed at the same time. He is interpreting this as some sort of ritualistic sacrifice. 13/10 I would sleep with one eye open (TT: goldenlifeofbailey)

item.title: Now for whiskers wednesday. Here's Iggy. You usually can't s…
item.author: Larry with Iggy and Ella (@larry-iggy-ella.bsky.social)
item.description:
Now for whiskers wednesday.
Here's Iggy. You usually can't see his whiskers as white on white tends not to show up in photos.
I got really close up while he was napping and this is probably as good as it gets with him
item.content:encoded:
Now for whiskers wednesday.
Here's Iggy. You usually can't see his whiskers as white on white tends not to show up in photos.
I got really close up while he was napping and this is probably as good as it gets with him

item.title: I have to admit that I didn’t know, and I even thought the S…
item.author: REMALONE (@ipasa.bsky.social)
item.description: I have to admit that I didn’t know, and I even thought the Spanish player Cucurella’s look was quite original, when it comes to his hair, but I was unaware of this: If he let his hair grow , it’s so that his autistic son can easily recognize him when he watches him on TV. Truly, this Spanish team ❤️
item.content:encoded: I have to admit that I didn’t know, and I even thought the Spanish player Cucurella’s look was quite original, when it comes to his hair, but I was unaware of this: If he let his hair grow , it’s so that his autistic son can easily recognize him when he watches him on TV. Truly, this Spanish team ❤️

item.title: A third American service member believed to have been killed…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A third American service member believed to have been killed by an Iranian attack on an air base in Jordan has been identified as Sgt. Angel S. Rampersad of New York.
item.content:encoded: A third American service member believed to have been killed by an Iranian attack on an air base in Jordan has been identified as Sgt. Angel S. Rampersad of New York.

item.title: In da gwass I found a bee And I desided it for me I noe dat …
item.author: Cheddar (@fartycheddarcat.bsky.social)
item.description:
In da gwass I found a bee
And I desided it for me
I noe dat bees, dey not for eat
But dey make such a nummy tweat!

I ses hallo, I ses dey snak
But wen I bite, dey bite me bak!
I let dem go, away dey fly
I not maked fwend, I not noes why

#CheddarPoetry #Bee #DeyNotWannaBeFwends
item.content:encoded:
In da gwass I found a bee
And I desided it for me
I noe dat bees, dey not for eat
But dey make such a nummy tweat!

I ses hallo, I ses dey snak
But wen I bite, dey bite me bak!
I let dem go, away dey fly
I not maked fwend, I not noes why

#CheddarPoetry #Bee #DeyNotWannaBeFwends

item.title: Today, Trump claimed that four service members who were kill…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
Today, Trump claimed that four service members who were killed over the last week said, "We cannot let Iran have a nuclear weapon."

There is no evidence that the service members, as the president so confidently claimed, ever said or believed this.
item.content:encoded:
Today, Trump claimed that four service members who were killed over the last week said, "We cannot let Iran have a nuclear weapon."

There is no evidence that the service members, as the president so confidently claimed, ever said or believed this.

item.title: The price of oil surged nearly 5% Wednesday as U.S. official…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: The price of oil surged nearly 5% Wednesday as U.S. officials talked down the chance of new peace talks after an 11th straight night of strikes on Iran and with major disruption now facing two of the world’s key supply routes.
item.content:encoded: The price of oil surged nearly 5% Wednesday as U.S. officials talked down the chance of new peace talks after an 11th straight night of strikes on Iran and with major disruption now facing two of the world’s key supply routes.
